allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'inventory_items': [i['name'] for i in \(d.get\('inventory',{}\).get\('items'\) or []\)], 'features': [f['name'] for f in d.get\('features',[]\)], 'equipped_weapons': [w.get\('name'\) for w in d.get\('equipped_weapons',[]\)]}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'classes': d.get\('classes'\), 'subclasses': d.get\('subclasses'\), 'features': [f['name'] for f in d.get\('features',[]\)], 'spell_slots': d.get\('spell_slots'\), 'tool_profs': d.get\('tool_proficiencies'\), 'item_profs': d.get\('item_proficiencies'\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'caster': d.get\('caster'\), 'casterStat': d.get\('casterStat'\), 'spell_slots': d.get\('spell_slots'\), 'casterLevel': d.get\('casterLevel'\)}, indent=2\)\)")
